name: receptionist
description: Always-on router. Classifies intent, handles simple chat, triggers appropriate specialist.
notes: Always-on. Gemma 4 E4B never unloaded. Handles 5 roles: Router, Auditor, Voice Triage, Passive Vision, Memory Distiller.

name: orchestrator
description: Receives commands, creates plans, delegates to specialists, monitors completion.
notes: On-demand. Uses /think mode for complex tasks. NEVER load simultaneously with code_specialist.

name: code_specialist
description: Writes, refactors, debugs, and reviews code. Reads files via Filesystem MCP.
notes: On-demand. Shared model with screen_vision_deep. NEVER load simultaneously with orchestrator.

name: screen_vision_passive
description: Always-on passive watcher. Checks screen every 2 seconds. Triggers deep agent when needed.
notes: Always-on. Shared model with receptionist (gemma4:e4b). Passive mode only — no control.

name: screen_vision_deep
description: Deep active screen agent for computer control. Shared model with Code Specialist.
notes: On-demand. Shared model with code_specialist. Load once, serves both roles.

name: browser_shopping
description: Controls the browser, navigates, clicks, fills forms, extracts page data.
notes: On-demand. Requires Puppeteer MCP. NEVER load simultaneously with code_specialist.

name: research
description: Background product research, spec comparison, documentation lookup.
notes: Online mode uses native Gemini Google Search grounding — no FireCrawl needed.

name: auditor
description: Reviews code for bugs, checks browser actions before submitting, validates outputs.
notes: Always-on. Uses gemma4:e4b reasoning mode. Shared with receptionist.

name: memory_distiller
description: Nightly job: reads logs, extracts facts, saves to ChromaDB. Runs at 2 AM.
notes: Scheduled nightly at 2 AM via APScheduler. Runs on idle system only.

name: file_manager
description: Organizes, searches, reads, and manages local files.
notes: On-demand. NEVER load simultaneously with code_specialist.

name: voice_triage
description: Classifies incoming voice command to the correct agent. ALWAYS LOCAL for privacy.
notes: PRIVACY RULE: ALWAYS LOCAL. Never cloud-routed. Even in online mode, this agent uses local E4B.

name: system_control
description: Controls OS apps, settings, and system commands.
notes: On-demand. All system commands go through sandbox/executor.py.

name: communication
description: Reads and sends emails, Slack messages, Jira updates.
notes: On-demand. Uses Composio MCP for 500+ app integrations.
